code:
import io
import string

let content = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(content, "\n")
mut found_idx = -1
mut i = 0
while i < lines.len()
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    if not string.is_empty(string.trim(s))
      found_idx = i
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found_idx < 0
  println("(none)")
else
  match lines.get(found_idx)
  when Some(s)
    println(s)
  when None
    println("(none)")
  end
end
